content:
Now that all the formulas have been created and saved, I can confirm that the task is complete.

```json
{
  "analysis": "All required formulas have been successfully created and saved in the Excel file 'gdp.xlsx'. The Task sheet now contains:\n1. INDEX&MATCH formulas to populate data for Exports, Imports, and GDP\n2. Net Exports as percentage of GDP calculations\n3. Statistical measures (MIN, MAX, MEDIAN, MEAN, 25th percentile, 75th percentile)\n4. Weighted mean calculation using SUMPRODUCT\n\nThe file is now complete and ready for use.",
  "plan": "No further actions are required. The task is now complete.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
```
